---
title: "bayesianmodel"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---
```{r}
library(MCMCpack)
library(brms)
```

```{r}
# load data
data <- read.csv('data.csv')
head(data)
```

```{r}
# feature set up
feature_cols <- c(
  "day_in_study",
  "active_mins",
  "glucose_mean",
  "rhr_mean",
  "sleep_score_overall",
  "lh",
  "estrogen",
  "sleep_efficiency_mean"
)

phase_df <- data
phase_df <- phase_df[, c(feature_cols, "phase")]
# drop missing rows
phase_df <- phase_df[complete.cases(phase_df), ]
# scale numeric features 
phase_df[, feature_cols] <- scale(phase_df[, feature_cols])
# convert phase to factor
phase_df$phase <- as.factor(phase_df$phase)

phase_df

```

```{r}
# Default priors
prior <- default_prior(
  phase ~ day_in_study + active_mins + glucose_mean + rhr_mean +
    sleep_score_overall + lh + estrogen + sleep_efficiency_mean,
  data = phase_df,
  family = categorical("logit")
)

prior
```
```{r}
# manual normal prior
manual_prior <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muFollicular"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muLuteal"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept", dpar = "muMenstrual"),

  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muFollicular"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muLuteal"),
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b", dpar = "muMenstrual")
)

manual_prior
```


```{r}
# Fit Bayesian categorical logistic regression
phase_brm <- brm(
  phase ~ day_in_study + active_mins + glucose_mean + rhr_mean +
    sleep_score_overall + lh + estrogen + sleep_efficiency_mean,
  family = categorical("logit"),
  data = phase_df,
  chains = 4,
  cores = getOption("mc.cores", 1),
  iter = 1000,
  warmup = 180,
  thin = 2,
  prior = manual_prior
)
```

```{r}
# Overall summary
summary(phase_brm)
```

```{r}
# Plot to check convergence
#plot(phase_brm)
```

```{r}
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "active_mins", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "glucose_mean", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "rhr_mean", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "sleep_score_overall", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "lh", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "estrogen", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(phase_brm, "sleep_efficiency_mean", categorical=TRUE))
```

# POSTERIOR_PREDICT
```{r}
# Posterior predictive distribution
post_preds <- posterior_predict(phase_brm)
head(post_preds)
```

```{r}
# Most common predicted class for each observation
pred_class <- apply(post_preds, 2, function(x) {
  as.numeric(names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1])
})
```

```{r}
# Map predicted class index back to phase label
phase_levels <- levels(phase_df$phase)
pred_labels <- phase_levels[pred_class]
```

```{r}
# Actual labels
actual <- phase_df$phase
```

```{r}
# Accuracy
accuracy <- mean(pred_labels == actual)
print(accuracy)
```

```{r}
# Confusion matrix
table(Predicted = pred_labels, Actual = actual)
```

# POSTERIOR_EPRED
```{r}
# Posterior expected probabilities for each phase
post_probs <- posterior_epred(phase_brm)
dim(post_probs)
```

```{r}
# Average posterior probability for each observation and class
mean_probs <- apply(post_probs, c(2, 3), mean)
colnames(mean_probs) <- phase_levels

head(mean_probs)
```

```{r}
pred_class <- apply(mean_probs, 1, which.max)
pred_labels <- phase_levels[pred_class]
actual <- phase_df$phase
```

```{r}
accuracy <- mean(pred_labels == actual)
print(accuracy)
```

```{r}
table(Predicted = pred_labels, Actual = actual)
```
# TRAIN TEST SPLIT
```{r}
set.seed(42)

n <- nrow(phase_df)
train_idx <- sample(1:n, size = 0.7 * n)

train_df <- phase_df[train_idx, ]
test_df  <- phase_df[-train_idx, ]
```

```{r}
train_phase_brm <- brm(
  phase ~ day_in_study + active_mins + glucose_mean + rhr_mean +
    sleep_score_overall + lh + estrogen + sleep_efficiency_mean,
  family = categorical("logit"),
  data = train_df,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 1000,
  warmup = 180,
  thin = 2,
  prior = manual_prior
)
```
```{r}
post_probs_test <- posterior_epred(train_phase_brm, newdata = test_df)

mean_probs_test <- apply(post_probs_test, c(2,3), mean)

tt_pred_class <- apply(mean_probs_test, 1, which.max)
tt_pred_labels <- levels(train_df$phase)[tt_pred_class]

tt_actual <- test_df$phase
```

```{r}
tt_accuracy <- mean(tt_pred_labels == tt_actual)
print(tt_accuracy)
```

```{r}
table(Predicted = tt_pred_labels, Actual = tt_actual)
```

```{r}
mean_probs_test[1,]
```

```{r}
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "active_mins", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "glucose_mean", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "rhr_mean", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "sleep_score_overall", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "lh", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "estrogen", categorical=TRUE))
plot(conditional_effects(train_phase_brm, "sleep_efficiency_mean", categorical=TRUE))
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
